g.onclick: sendPrompt('What audio formats and quality requirements does MSP accept for music uploads?')
sendPrompt('What formats does MSP accept for podcast uploads and what metadata is required?')
sendPrompt('How does MSP archive a live show into the VOD catalog after streaming ends?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST /api/upload route do step by step?')
sendPrompt('What MIME types and file size limits does MSP enforce on upload?')
sendPrompt('What quality checks does ffprobe run on uploads — bitrate, codec, streams?')
sendPrompt('How does BLAKE3 fingerprinting work in MSP and why is it used instead of MD5?')
sendPrompt('What JSON schemas validate MSP content — music.schema.json, podcast.schema.json, art.schema.json?')
sendPrompt('What happens when upload validation fails — what error code and cleanup?')
